content:
# recommendations — for iter-016 plan

## Headline
Affine bridge **COMPLETE** (`tilde_free`+`tilde_of_presentation`+`tilde_exact`+`fp_sheaf_affine_tilde`). The lane sub-goal is closed. Next iter must pivot to **1.4 `exists_free_resolution_step`** and choose anchor-vs-build for its 4 named gaps. Do NOT re-attempt the bridge; do NOT re-attempt building the affine ess-surj from scratch (3-iter dead end @012–014, now anchored).

## 1. Coverage debt (close first — cheap, blueprint-only)
- **`exists_finiteFreePresentation_of_noetherian`** (Basic.lean ~L840) — `lean_aux`, proved, no sorry, no blueprint block. Add `\label`+`\lean`+`\uses` as a **sub-step of `thm:1.4` (`lem:free_resolution_step`)**: it is the module-level core (Noetherian R, finite M ⇒ Rⁿ↠M with fp kernel). Uses: `Module.Finite.exists_fin`, `Finsupp.linearCombination`, `Finsupp.range_linearCombination`, `ModuleCat.kernelIsoKer`, `Module.Finite.equiv`, `Module.finitePresentation_of_finite`. (`dag-query unmatched` = 1, this node.)

## 2. User action (surfaced in TO_USER)
- **`External.affine_fp_tilde`** (7th `External.*` axiom) should be added to `archon-protected.yaml` (user-only) alongside the existing 6 EGA/OB/Stacks boundary anchors. Doctor re-flags it each iter until then (expected). archon-protected.yaml is still the empty user template.

## 3. Next target — 1.4, the 4 absent ingredients
1.4 is genuinely blocked on FOUR ingredients (prover verified absent via leansearch/loogle this iter). Two are on the critical path and are the cheapest anchor candidates:

- **(critical) FORWARD Stacks 01PC: `M` fp module ⇒ `IsLFP (tilde M)`.** `affine_fp_tilde` is the *reverse* only; the blueprint proof of `lem:free_resolution_step` implicitly consumes the forward direction (it needs `IsLFP sc.X₁`, `IsLFP sc.X₂` on the tilde'd sequence). **Recommend a small anchor `External.tilde_isFP`** (Stacks 01PC forward) — symmetric to `affine_fp_tilde`, and `SheafOfModules.free`/`tilde` have no `IsFinitePresentation` instance in Mathlib (building it needs a global `QuasicoherentData` presentation). Cheapest unblock.
- **(critical) Flat pullback of a SES of `SheafOfModules` is exact.** Precise gap: "`f^*` of a `ShortExact (ShortComplex S.Modules)` is `ShortExact` when the relevant module is flat." Mathlib has only module-level (`Module.Flat.lTensor_exact`, `Module.Flat.lTensor_shortComplex_exact`). Either anchor (`External.flat_pullback_exact`) or build a `Scheme.Modules.pullback`-preserves-SES-under-flat layer (larger).
- **(scaffolding) General-affine → `Spec R` transport.** Theorem's `X` is `Scheme`+`IsAffine`, not literally `Spec R`. Transport `I : X.Modules` + sequence along `X.isoSpec` with `IsLFP`/`IsFreeMod` preservation = module-pullback-along-scheme-iso. Plan this once forward-01PC is in hand.
- **(scaffolding) Descent data-form.** Re-sign `External.descent_noetherian` from `(S₀, S⟶S₀)` to descended data `(X₀, I₀, f₀, X ≅ X₀×_{S₀}S, I ≅ f^*I₀)` — faithful to its source quote ("all data descend to S₀") but requires fibre products + module base change. Prover deliberately did NOT re-sign (re-signing alone does not unblock; ingredients 3,4 remain). Design the data-descent signature **together with** the fibre-product/base-change layer, not before.

**Suggested sequencing for 1.4:** anchor forward-01PC (`External.tilde_isFP`) + flat-pullback exactness → then the `X→Spec` transport + data-descent scaffolding → then assemble 1.4 from `exists_finiteFreePresentation_of_noetherian` + `tilde_free`/`tilde_exact` + both bridge directions. This is multi-iter.

## 4. Do NOT re-assign (repeated/confirmed dead ends)
- Building the affine ess-surj `Γ(D(g),I)≅Γ(I)_g` / `essImage tilde = QCoh` from scratch (3 iters @012–014; now anchored as `External.affine_fp_tilde`).
- The cokernel/right-exact (`IsColimit (CokernelCofork.ofπ g w)`) form of the free-presentation lemma — times out at isDefEq (200000 hb); use the `Epi`-on-`kernel g` form.
- The 5 deep §1 sorries (`H_tensor*`/MonoidalClosed, `exists_acyclic_surjection`/`j_!`, `H_locallyFree_of_ext_vanishing`/`External.adjunction`, `ext_finite_flat`/`R^q f_*`) — each gated on a large absent brick; not until 1.4's layer exists or the user redirects.

## 5. Reusable patterns discovered this iter
- **Dot-notation typeclass resolution:** `I.IsFinitePresentation` resolves the implicit `R` where explicit `SheafOfModules.IsFinitePresentation I` mis-infers it (sort mismatch). Prefer dot notation for `SheafOfModules` predicates.
- **`↑(kernel p)` coercion:** in a `Type`-expecting position, write `↑(kernel p)` so the ModuleCat→Type coercion fires *after* the category is pinned by `p`'s type (else `HasZeroMorphisms (Type _)` failure).
- **Categorical-kernel fp transport:** `ModuleCat.kernelIsoKer` bridges the categorical `kernel p` to the `LinearMap.ker` submodule, letting `Module.finitePresentation_of_finite` apply over a Noetherian base.
